allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d['predictions'][0]; print\('description:', p.get\('description'\)\); print\('geometry:', p.get\('geometry'\)\); print\('structured_formatting main:', p['structured_formatting']['main_text']\)")
